title: cereus nycticallus
intro: Cereus nycticallus, also known as the Night-Blooming Cereus, is a species of cactus that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cereus nycticallus include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Cereus nycticallus can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
